content.en:
Terran, Ye family.

The Ye family is the first major clan of the human race, and it is a bloodline born from Ye Xingchen's lineage, Ye Xingchen, as Ye Tian's only son, has always been very pendeed, so he has not given birth to a few heirs, but the Ye family below is too capable of giving birth.

In addition, as long as the Ye family has good talent, almost all of them can be immortal, so gradually, the number of people in the Ye family is increasing.

And in this era, the Ye family gave birth to a truly demonic existence.

This genius of the Ye family is very high, not very far from Ye Xingchen's generation, but the great-grandson of Ye Xingchen's third son, and the bloodline of the Ye family, he has cultivated to the realm of the Domain Ancestor in a short period of time, and has broken through to the peak realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor early.

Moreover, when the Supreme Domain Ancestor was at the peak realm, his combat power was not weaker than that of the ordinary Ancestor.

And now, this Ye family genius has broken through to the Ancestor Realm.

Only by becoming an ancestor can you be qualified to become the backbone of the human race, and if you don't become an ancestor one day, you are not qualified to be noticed by the high-level of the human race.

No matter how demonic a genius is, as long as he can't enter the ancestor, it won't make any sense.

Even in this day and age, it is difficult to become an ancestor.

As soon as the genius of the Ye family entered the ancestor, he challenged a top elite ancestor, and won in one battle, and his record was not weaker than that of the former Ye Tian.

Of course, Ye Tian lacked inheritance at that time, and now the human race does not lack inheritance, and it is too easy to improve his strength, so the two cannot be compared.

But even so, this incident caused a sensation for the entire human race.

Many high-level people of the human race thought that the genius of the Ye family had the hope of becoming an invincible ancestor, and even Ye Xingchen was out of the customs and personally summoned this descendant of the Ye family.

---------------

Ye Jinpeng was a little nervous, this time it was Ye Xingchen's ancestor of the Ye family who wanted to see him, this was his grandfather.

Although Ye Xingchen's grandfather's strength is not as good as Ye Tian, the real ancestor of the Ye family, his strength is also extremely strong, he is a sixth-rank invincible ancestor, far from being comparable to other high-level human races.

Soon, Ye Xingchen came.

"I've seen grandpa!"

Ye Jinpeng knocked on the road.

"Jin Peng, you are very good!" Ye Xingchen praised.

"Thank you grandpa for the compliment!" Ye Jinpeng was quite excited.

Ye Xingchen continued: "Your talent is much better than mine, the reason why I was able to become a sixth-rank invincible ancestor is entirely because of the help of my father, if it were not for my father's help, I am afraid it would be a little difficult for me to become an ancestor." However, the cultivation environment of the human race is much better than before, and it is not difficult to become an ancestor. But ordinary ancestors, elite ancestors, and top ancestors are just starting, and even the strongest ancestors are just starting, and only by becoming an invincible ancestor can they be qualified to go to the eternal world. "

Ye Jinpeng listened carefully.

Ye Xingchen continued: "With my talent, I'm afraid I won't be able to guide you too much, but our Ye family has never given birth to a genius as talented as you, I am ready to inform my father and let my father guide you." "

"Let the Ancestor guide me?"

Ye Jinpeng was extremely excited, he grew up listening to the legend of the ancestor, if there was no ancestor, there would be no Ye family today, let alone the glory of the human race today.

Legend has it that the strength of Ancestor Ye Tian far surpassed that of Ancestor Ye Xingchen, and even in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, he was an incomparably powerful existence.

"Thank you, Grandpa!"

Ye Jinpeng said gratefully.

Soon, Ye Xingchen sent a message to Ye Tian's invincible ancestor clone who was guarding the Dark Forbidden Domain.

-------------

"The Ye family has given birth to a genius with a fast cultivation speed, an incomparably solid foundation, and has just broken through to the Ancestor Realm, so he can defeat the top elite Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Such a genius junior, he really needs to see it, maybe in the future, under his cultivation, this Ye family junior is qualified to become a supreme ancestor.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled in and came to Ye Xingchen's face.

"Father, this is Jinpeng, Qi'er's great-grandson!" Ye Xingchen introduced.

Qi'er's great-grandson?

Ye Tian naturally knew that his grandson Ye Qi, Ye Qi's great-grandson, was his bloodline, and the relationship was more appropriate.

So, Ye Tian looked at Ye Jinpeng carefully.

But after looking at it, he saw that something was wrong.

"Xingchen, you go out first!"

Ye Tian ordered.

Ye Xingchen sensed that something was wrong, but he didn't ask anything and left immediately.

At this time, Ye Tian pressed a hand on Ye Jinpeng's shoulder and probed Ye Jinpeng's body.

"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Even if Ye Jinpeng was stupid, he knew that his secret had been discovered by the ancestor, and he suddenly became a little worried.

He hadn't always been so genius, but when he was very weak, he happened to encounter a ball of light, and then merged with this light, and this light occasionally transmitted some information to him to guide him in the direction of his cultivation.

Under the guidance of this group of light, he can advance all the way to the Ancestor Realm.

However, this light will not answer him too many questions, and many things will need to be explored by himself.

However, he felt that this light was a great opportunity, and its origin was extremely mysterious, after all, even if he stepped into the Ancestor Realm, he was completely confused about this light, and even the ancestor of the Sixth Rank Invincible Ancestor Realm couldn't find the light in his body.

But unexpectedly, the ancestor found out.

Now that the ancestor found out, Ye Jinpeng didn't dare to hide it, even if the ancestor really wanted to be greedy for his chance, he couldn't help it.

"Ancestor, I confess!" Ye Jinpeng hurriedly said: "I have become such a genius, not because of how good my talent is, but also because I have obtained a light group!"

Ye Tian let go of his hand and said, "Do you know what that light cluster is?"

"I don't know!" Ye Jinpeng shook his head.

Ye Tian said: "I just temporarily sealed that light group, and the consciousness in the light group is not clear about what is happening, so his conversation between us cannot be heard for the time being. Actually, it was supposed to be the origin of some mysterious eternal source, but the crippled consciousness of a strong man tried to be reborn with the help of this mass of eternal source origin. And this mysterious eternal source may fit your physique and soul, so it chooses you. Strictly speaking, the stronger you are, the stronger the consciousness will be restored little by little, until one day it completely occupies your consciousness, or merges with your consciousness, which can be regarded as another kind of rebirth. After all, strictly speaking, the other party has fallen, and can only use this way to continue the survival of consciousness. At that time, if you are the dominant consciousness, then you are still you, but if the other person is the dominant consciousness, then you are no longer you. And everything you have experienced is not worth mentioning compared to the other party, and it is more likely that the other party is the dominant consciousness. "

In fact, Ye Tian was also a little surprised, at the level of the Ancestor, it was almost impossible to take away, but that mysterious Eternal Source Origin was assimilating Ye Jinpeng's Soul Origin, so this provided the conditions for the consciousness to take away.

"What, Ancestor, what you said is true?"

Ye Jinpeng panicked.

"I'll take you somewhere!"

Ye Tian grabbed Ye Jinpeng and went to the core area of the Dark Forbidden Domain, which was the place where all things were yang.

There's a big horror there!

Ye Jinpeng was very nervous, he knew that there was a treasure land in the center of the human race, but every time he wanted to go over, there was a great emotion of horror from the light cluster in his body, so he had never been to Wanwuyang, where the core area of the human race was located.

But at this moment, he was a little strange, he didn't feel the emotion of great terror.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian took Ye Jinpeng to stand not far from the eternal source of the Ten Thousand Things Yang.

"This is the powerful secret of the Terran in this era - the eternal source of all things yang, I brought back all things yang, so the people of the human race have undergone qualitative changes from blood, body, and soul, even the strength of children is comparable to the powerful warriors of the past. "

"If you feel it carefully, is the origin aura of the Yang of All Things similar to the light cluster in your body?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ye Jinpeng really felt it.

"It's really about the same!"

Ye Jinpeng was shocked.

He had now believed what the Ancestor had said, and the light cluster in his body was very weak compared to the origin of the Yang of All Things.

The ancestor could even get his hands on all things, so naturally it couldn't be the opportunity to covet him.

At this time, Ye Tian gave Ye Jinpeng two choices: "Jinpeng, I will give you two options to choose from, you can fuse with the origin of the eternal source thing, this is almost never happening, even I have never heard of a weak creature being able to fuse with the origin of the eternal source thing, even if it is only a little fusion, but it is also a great opportunity, because of this, your physique has become very special, a bit similar to the source body, but it is far inferior to the source body at present." If you are willing to keep this source, there will be many unknowns in the future, but it is also very likely that you will grow by leaps and bounds to become a truly powerful being. The second option is for me to destroy the light in your body. But, in either case, I'm going to drain that mysterious crippled consciousness from your body, and I won't let it affect you!"

"Old Ancestor, I choose the first way!"

Ye Jinpeng decided.
